mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR keywords LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) AND status = 'active' ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM document WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC
